Title: Valid login
Steps: Enter tomsmith and published valid password; select Login
Expected Result: Secure Area opens and success notification is visible

Title: Invalid username
Steps: Enter wrong username and password; select Login
Expected Result: Login is rejected with username-specific message

Title: Invalid password
Steps: Enter valid username and wrong password; select Login
Expected Result: Login is rejected with password-specific message

Title: Logout
Expected Result: Login page opens and success logout message is visible

Title: Back navigation after logout
Expected Result: Secure content is not accessible without authentication

Title: Toggle both checkboxes
Expected Result: Each checkbox reflects the requested state independently

Title: Select option 2
Expected Result: Option 2 becomes the single selected value

Title: Remove checkbox
Expected Result: Checkbox disappears and confirmation is displayed

Title: Submit blank login form
Steps: Leave both fields empty and submit
Expected Result: Actionable validation or authentication error is displayed

Title: Keyboard-only login
Steps: Navigate and submit using keyboard only
Expected Result: Focus order is logical and visible; form can be completed
